query: SELECT pa.id as assignmentId, pa.patientId, pa.protocolId, pa.status, p.name as protocolName, pt.firstName, pt.lastName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_steps ast WHERE ast.assignmentId = pa.id) as assignmentStepCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM protocol_steps ps WHERE ps.protocolId = pa.protocolId) as libraryStepCount FROM protocol_assignments pa JOIN protocols p ON p.id = pa.protocolId JOIN patients pt ON pt.id = pa.patientId;
